likely_causes: ~/.local/bin is not on PATH
CLI install step did not complete
fixes: Run buoy path-add if the binary exists
Rerun install.sh or the remote installer if the binary is missing
issues.escalation_path: If the binary still is not present after reinstall, inspect install.sh output and the selected BIN_DIR.

likely_causes: Installed CLI cannot be resolved by the app
buoy status --json failed or returned invalid output
checks: Confirm the CLI is installed and executable
fixes: Reinstall Buoy
Confirm the CLI works before reopening the app
issues.escalation_path: Inspect ShellBridge CLI path resolution if the app still disagrees with the CLI.

likely_causes: Administrator authentication was denied
pmset returned an error
The app could not run the CLI through the privileged bridge
The immediate mode-switch action failed before status refreshed
checks: Repeat the action in Terminal if possible
fixes: Retry and complete the macOS administrator prompt
Verify pmset and osascript are available
Refresh status after the command error; do not treat the optimistic switch position as confirmed state
issues.escalation_path: Capture the CLI error message and confirm whether the failure occurs in both the app and Terminal.

issues.symptom: Mode is Off but the persistent sleep policy needs repair
likely_causes: SleepDisabled is still 1
An AC or battery system-sleep timer is set to Never
A legacy or external power change left no usable restore point
checks: Run buoy status and confirm Mode remains Off
Inspect the persistent policy issue, SleepDisabled, and AC and battery system-sleep timer values
Treat display sleep as a separate setting; displaysleep=0 does not block system sleep
Do not treat PreventUserIdleSystemSleep or other temporary assertions as a persistent policy failure
fixes: Run buoy off
Use Repair Sleep in the app when Mode is already Off
Verify that SleepDisabled is 0 and every supported system-sleep timer is finite
Confirm that a saved display-sleep value was restored exactly rather than normalized as a system-sleep blocker
issues.escalation_path: Inspect BuoyEngine repair and verification output if Off cannot establish a safe persistent policy. Keep Mode Off as the ownership truth even when policy repair fails.

issues.symptom: Mode is Off but automatic idle sleep is temporarily deferred
likely_causes: An application holds PreventUserIdleSystemSleep
macOS powerd or another system service holds a temporary assertion
A foreground task has requested temporary keep-awake behavior
checks: Inspect temporary assertion names separately from Mode and persistent policy
fixes: No Buoy repair is required when the persistent policy is healthy
Close or stop the owning application only if its temporary behavior is unwanted
issues.escalation_path: Assertions are informational diagnostics and must never redefine Buoy Mode or make a verified Off action fail. Escalate only when a persistent SleepDisabled or timer blocker remains.

likely_causes: Helper process was killed externally
Saved PID is stale
fixes: Reapply Buoy with --clam
issues.escalation_path: Inspect helper launch flow in BuoyEngine if the helper stops repeatedly.

likely_causes: Protected folder access was not granted
The scan path timed out or could not be inspected
checks: Review Access Grants in the Storage section
Read the Storage status text for skipped paths
fixes: Enable and grant the relevant protected folder
Refresh Summary again after the grant is saved
issues.escalation_path: Inspect StorageAccessManager and StorageScanner if paths remain skipped after a valid grant.

likely_causes: Only a summary snapshot exists
No deep scan has completed for the current access fingerprint
checks: Look for Partial Scan in the Storage state label
Check whether a last deep scan timestamp is shown
fixes: Run Deep Scan
issues.escalation_path: Inspect StorageCacheStore and StorageRefreshPolicy if deep scans complete but partial status remains.

issues.symptom: Battery, wattage, or thermal values are unavailable
likely_causes: Machine does not expose the value
The host has no battery
CPU temperature is intentionally unavailable in the current source
checks: Compare behavior on a notebook versus a desktop Mac
fixes: Treat missing battery data as normal on desktop Macs
Use thermal pressure when CPU temperature is unavailable
issues.escalation_path: Only escalate if a value disappears on hardware where it was previously available and other power metrics still work.

likely_causes: swiftc is missing
Active macOS SDK path is unavailable
Local Apple toolchain is unhealthy
fixes: Repair the Apple toolchain
Use the repo scripts rather than ad hoc compiler commands
issues.escalation_path: If build scripts still fail, capture the exact compiler output and the active developer directory.
